name: Potato Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together until smooth.
2. Gradually add in the mashed potatoes, pecans, milk, melted chocolate, cinnamon, nutmeg, and baking powder to the butter mixture.
3. Mix in the eggs and baking powder separately before combining everything gently.
4. Pour the batter into greased layer pans.
5. Bake for 40 minutes at 350°F (175°C), or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. For filling, prepare cooked icing with marshmallows beaten in while still hot.
7. If desired, add chopped nuts and raisins to the icing before serving.
